description_long: This is a wooden paddle with a long, straight handle and a broad, flat blade. The blade is rectangular with slightly tapered shoulders leading up to the handle, and the wood grain is visible across its surface, giving it a natural, unfinished appearance. The handle is narrow, straight, and seamlessly integrated into the blade, with no visible grip or ergonomic shaping. The paddle appears to be made from a single piece of wood, with no visible joints, fasteners, or reinforcements. The edges of the blade are straight and squared, with no cutouts or decorative elements. There are no visible markings, logos, or signs of wear on any part of the paddle.
description: A long, straight wooden paddle with a rectangular blade and visible wood grain, featuring a simple, unadorned design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the rectangular blade and the straight handle extending upward.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the paddle's flatness.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the blade's width and wood grain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the paddle's thin edge and straight handle.
attribute_blade_design: rectangular blade with straight edges and slightly tapered shoulders, no cutouts or reinforcements
